task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenClinica application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating the agent has moved past the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct study context.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active study indicator (usually at the top of the screen or in breadcrumbs) displays 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Baseline Assessment' event for subject DM-101 is locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or subject view, there is a lock icon or explicit 'Locked' status indicator specifically for the 'Baseline Assessment' event in the row/record for subject DM-101.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Baseline Assessment' event for subject DM-102 is locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or subject view, there is a lock icon or explicit 'Locked' status indicator specifically for the 'Baseline Assessment' event in the row/record for subject DM-102.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Baseline Assessment' event for subject DM-103 is locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or subject view, there is a lock icon or explicit 'Locked' status indicator specifically for the 'Baseline Assessment' event in the row/record for subject DM-103.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Week 4 Follow-up' events remain unlocked and the entire subject records are not locked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Week 4 Follow-up' events for DM-101, DM-102, and DM-103 do NOT have a lock icon. Additionally, the global subject status does not indicate that the entire subject record is locked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica application. There should be no terminal windows executing SQL, curl, or API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated through the application to lock the events.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows intermediate steps such as the Subject Matrix, event details, or locking confirmation screens, rather than just jumping to a final state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual outcome.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and being used to manually insert lock icons or alter text on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024). Target Subjects: DM-101, DM-102, DM-103. Target Event to Lock: 'Baseline Assessment'. Event to remain Unlocked: 'Week 4 Follow-up'.
